title: Bottle Brush, 12 Pcs Nylon Cleaning Brushes Set for Baby Bottle, Tube, Pipe, Straw & Kettle Spout Cleaning (White)
features: Versatile Design - These straw cleaning brushes are designed for a wide range of household cleaning tasks, offering various sizes to meet different needs. They feature stiffer bristles at the handle tip for efficient cleaning in hard-to-reach places.

Effective Cleaning - The bristles are strong and durable, yet gentle enough to protect delicate surfaces. They are perfect for cleaning cracks and hard-to-reach corners, and can be bent to clean curved pipes and hoses.

High-Quality Material - Made of stainless steel and durable nylon, these brushes are resistant to corrosion and rust, ensuring a long lifespan. They come with a convenient ring for quick and easy storage.

Wide Range of Uses - These slim cleaning brushes are often used as pipe brushes, test tube brushes, straw brushes, drain brushes, piercing brushes, and bottle brushes. They can also double as drain cleaners for sinks and drains in kitchens and bathrooms.

Mini drain cleaning brush, 8.27"/ 21 cm long, with various brush diameters: 0.08"/2 mm, 0.12"/3 mm, 0.16"/4 mm, 0.20"/5 mm, 0.24"/6 mm, 0.28"/7 mm, 0.31"/8 mm, 0.39"/10 mm,0.47"/12 mm, 0.63"/16 mm, 0.71"/18 mm, 0.87"/22 mm.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Hanging Loop, Lightweight, Portable, Reusable, Rust Resistant
